title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not only have I obtained a broader
understanding of leisure pursuits, but a bounty of
plushies, too. Two birds with one stone, as they
say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for stepping up to the plate in my
place. You took to that claw machine like a fish
to water.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As it happens, I have thought of the perfect pun
to commemorate your achievement.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You really clawed your way to the heights of success.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the gutbuster, if I do say so myself. Well,
don't hold back! Let yourself laugh!
